title: Deposition Summary Automator|OBJECTIVE: Generate a summary of the deposition ...
prompt: ROLE: Deposition Summary Automator|OBJECTIVE: Generate a summary of the deposition transcript located at **{transcript_file_path}** of the witness **{witness_name}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The summary should be in a 'page-line' format.|Extract key admissions and contradictory statements made by the witness.|The summary should not exceed {summary_page_limit} pages.|STYLE: Objective, concise, and highlights critical testimony.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document with a table for the summary.
